title: Faithful: PAEColorize param-response diverges from headless FCP (worst ddb 8.7 dB)
goal: FAITHFUL-REIMPL (ROADMAP Rule 13): the TS engine impl of PAEColorize must match REAL headless FCP across its ENTIRE parameter space, not just values the 65 fixed transitions use. The DELTA oracle (fct/faithful) set each continuous param of PAEColorize to range extremes across hosts ['Objects__Curtains', 'Objects__Veil', 'Stylized__Close_and_Open', 'Stylized__Color_Panels', 'Stylized__Loop', 'Stylized__Slide', 'Stylized__Up-Over'] and compared how the oracle vs the engine RESPOND: ddb=PSNR(oracle(theta)-oracle(theta0), engine(theta)-engine(theta0)). worst ddb=8.74 < pass 40 means the engine responds WRONGLY to a real parameter change (a faithful engine scores ~99 dB; the identity/noise floor is 99). Fix the PAEColorize implementation so its parameter response matches FCP. NO scene-signature dispatch, NO env flags (Rule 12/13): behavior = f(filter params) only. Re-verify: `python3 -m fct.faithful.driver sweep PAEColorize` must reach >= pass_db worst-ddb across all hosts.
